scene.message: Doctor: My nurse is such a{nl} busybody, it's no good.{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: All right then,{nl} all of you...{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Hm. Let's get you{nl} treated, then.{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Mm, that should do it.{waitkey}{ret}
Doctor: Good. Come straight{nl} back if anything comes up.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Sonomura an idol, huh...{nl} Not bad! You think so,
right?{waitkey}{ret}
, I imagine.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Doctors are kinda{nl} full of themselves, huh.{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Forget
